description: End-to-end finance pipeline eval: data-fetcher → analyst → debater. Tests the full 3-stage chain from finance-pipeline SKILL.md. Only the final debater output is judged (verdict must be present).

stages.prompt: Retrieve current market data for {symbol}. Return the stock price, P/E ratio, market cap, and revenue TTM as a structured summary.
Analyze this market data and form an investment thesis: {prev_output}. Cover technical, fundamental, and sentiment factors. End with a rating (buy/hold/sell).
Challenge this investment thesis with bull and bear cases: {prev_output}. Identify key risks. Conclude with a final verdict on whether the thesis holds.
